site-notice-body:
We are thrilled to announce that the Georgia Golden Olympics are planning a grand return in September 2026! We are excited to confirm that this year's games will be held in a new location: Clayton County!

After a brief hiatus in 2025, we know athletes across the state are ready to get back to competition, fun, and fellowship.

Stay tuned for more news and updates on specific venues and registration as they become available. We can't wait to see you all again!
